title: Claude Code Statusline Documentation
notes: Official API contract. Defines stdin JSON schema, debounce behavior, output capabilities.

title: Claude Code Changelog
notes: v2.1.81 release notes confirming rate_limits field addition.

title: GitHub Issue #31670 - Statusline not executed on Windows
notes: Primary Windows blocker. Workaround by apocalx confirmed 2026-03-22.

title: GitHub Issue #32917 - Output intermittently not rendered
notes: Intermittent rendering failures on Windows. No fix available.

title: sirmalloc/ccstatusline
notes: 5.8k stars, 210 commits, v2.2.6. Most feature-rich Claude Code statusline tool.

title: Haleclipse/CCometixLine
notes: 2.3k stars, Rust binary. Pre-built Windows binaries via winget.

title: Owloops/claude-powerline
notes: 947 stars, 297 commits. 6 themes, 4 styles, budget tracking.

title: chongdashu/cc-statusline
notes: 532 stars. Bash + jq, lightweight, burn rate monitoring.

title: stephenleo/cship
notes: 262 stars, Rust. Starship passthrough, <10ms render budget. No documented Windows support.

title: felipeelias/claude-statusline
notes: Go binary, v0.4.0, Starship-inspired. Very new (6 days old). Test command for iterating.

title: martinemde/starship-claude
notes: 56 stars. Plugin marketplace integration. Referenced in official docs.

title: lualine.nvim
notes: 6.8k stars. Gold standard for terminal statusline design. A-B-C-X-Y-Z section model.

title: VS Code Status Bar UX Guidelines
notes: Microsoft's design guidelines. Color-as-state, scope separation, actionable items.

title: Starship
notes: 48k stars. Conditional module pioneer. Anomaly-only surfacing pattern originator.

title: Session #229 Research Output
notes: Prior research synthesis. Anomaly-driven design, canonical widget list, 3-phase plan.

title: Claude Code Plugin Directory
notes: 72+ plugins, 24 categories. Plugin marketplace for distribution.

title: heirline.nvim
notes: 1.2k stars. Programmable degradation via flex components and priority system.

title: GitHub Copilot CLI Status Sidebar Proposal (Issue #981)
notes: Most comprehensive AI coding session status design proposal. Information hierarchy.

title: btop
notes: System monitor with sparkline visualization. Consistent green/yellow/red color language.

title: Oh My Posh
notes: 21k stars. Cross-platform prompt with Claude Code integration. Windows-native.

title: ccusage Statusline
notes: Usage analysis integration with Claude Code statusline. Session cost, burn rate.

title: tmux
notes: 37k stars. Gold standard for terminal status bars. Three-zone architecture.

title: Microsoft Status Bars Design Basics
notes: 5-7 widget rule. Status bar design principles.

title: Ink (React for CLI)
notes: 27k stars. Used by ccstatusline. Takes over terminal rendering.

title: Creating The Perfect Claude Code Status Line
notes: Community tutorial on statusline customization.

title: Windows Terminal Status Bar Feature Request
notes: Proposed since 2019, still in backlog. Confirms no native Windows Terminal status bar.

title: bottombar (Python)
notes: VT100 scroll-region technique for persistent status bar. Cross-platform including Windows.
